title: MiniMax与Cysic联办CyOps Arena：$5000奖金+M3八折
full_text:

Post
MiniMax (official)
@MiniMax_AI
Excited to cohost this one with @ cysic_xyz
With $5,000 dollars in prizes and 80% off M3, there is about to be some incredible projects built.
Now is your chance, what are you waiting for. Get building with M3 and CyOps today 🚀
Cysic
@cysic_xyz
14h
ICYMI: CyOps Arena is now live, co-hosted with @ MiniMax_AI .
With a $5,000 prize pool and 80% off MiniMax M3 model token pricing, there's never been a better time to start building.
New to CyOps? Watch this quick tutorial and get your first project up and running in minutes 👇
